codeGate.heading: Enter consultant code
codeGate.errorInvalid: Invalid code. Please check and try again.

introForm.heading: Welcome to the DISC Analysis
introForm.employmentQuestion: Is your DISC profile part of a potential employment process?
introForm.consentMainText: I give consent for my personal data to be processed by Coachers ApS for the purpose of generating my DISC profile.
introForm.consentBullet1: AI-based analysis via Anthropic (USA) for profile generation
introForm.consentBullet2: Sharing my DISC profile with my assigned consultant
introForm.consentRetention: My data is stored for 90 days (employment-related) or up to 24 months (other purposes) and can be deleted upon request.
introForm.consentTransfer: Personal data is transferred to a third country (USA) based on the EU Commission's Standard Contractual Clauses.
introForm.consentPrivacyLink: Read our full privacy policy here:
introForm.consentAgeConfirm: I confirm that I am at least 16 years old
introForm.consentWithdrawalText: I can withdraw my consent at any time by contacting info@coachers.dk. Upon withdrawal, all personal data and responses will be deleted without undue delay, unless other legislation requires continued storage.

validation.consent: You must consent to data processing.
validation.age: You must confirm that you are at least 16 years old.

prepScreen.heading: Good Advice
prepScreen.advice1: Make sure you can concentrate without interruptions.
prepScreen.advice2: Allow approximately 10-15 minutes to complete the analysis.
prepScreen.advice3: Choose the answer that naturally comes to mind.

survey.hint: Choose one that fits MOST and one that fits LEAST.
survey.errorSame: MOST and LEAST cannot be the same statement.
survey.errorBothRequired: Choose both MOST and LEAST before continuing.
survey.errorAllRequired: All questions must have both MOST and LEAST, and they cannot be the same.
survey.submitFail: Could not submit the response ({err}). Please try again.

thankYou.heading: Thank you for your response!
thankYou.text: Your DISC V2.2 response has been received and the report is being processed.
